notes: Improved Pathmark Online guidance so routines are described as capacity-supporting habits and goals are framed around closure criteria plus the next one or two actions.
Changed the Google sign-in/reconnect controls to redirect in the current browser tab, reducing the extra-tab behaviour seen with Streamlit link buttons.
Added Google Calendar colour dropdowns and colour swatches for Areas.
Added stronger routine schedule validation so frequency and preferred days are compatible with task and calendar exports.
Added a printable PDF tasklist export alongside the plain text tasklist.
Added an online theme selector saved to the user's Pathmark Sync sheet.
Added an option to write the Google Tasks export into a google_tasks_export tab in the user's Pathmark Sync sheet.
